name: Priya Sharma
text: Absolutely phenomenal experience! The Butter Chicken here is legendary — rich, creamy, and perfectly spiced. The staff was incredibly warm and the ambiance made our anniversary dinner truly special.

name: Rahul Mehta
text: Ordered the Family Feast Combo and it was absolutely worth every rupee! Generous portions, everything arrived hot, and the Dal Makhani alone was worth the visit. Will definitely return.

name: Sneha Kulkarni
text: The Paneer Tikka Masala is simply divine. Perfectly charred paneer, thick vibrant gravy. Paired with Garlic Naan it was a match made in heaven. Desserts were a beautiful end!

name: Arjun Patel
text: Great food overall! The Chicken Biryani was fragrant and filling. Service was prompt. Minor delay in seating on a weekend but totally understandable given how popular this place is.

name: Divya Nair
text: I brought my parents here for their anniversary and they were floored. The private dining section is beautiful. Rasmalai was the highlight — silky, delicate, and perfectly chilled.

name: Karan Singh
text: Best restaurant in the area, no contest. Every single dish we ordered — Seekh Kebab, Dal Makhani, Veg Platter — was flawless. The Mango Lassi is the best I've ever had.

name: Meera Reddy
text: Lovely family dinner! Food was hot, fresh, and incredibly tasty. Kids loved the Gulab Jamun. The ambiance is warm and inviting. Parking could be better on weekends.

name: Vikram Joshi
text: Stumbled upon this place while looking for good Indian food. Left completely blown away! The portions are generous, prices are fair, and the quality is restaurant-level. Highly recommend.

name: Ananya Das
text: A hidden gem! The Masala Chai here is an experience in itself — perfectly spiced and aromatic. Combined with the Samosas, it's the perfect evening snack. I come here every week now.
